title: Thermochemical Fluids in Greenhouse Farming
subtitle: Podręcznik szkoleniowy
description: A training manual presenting the TheGreefa project's development and demonstration of thermochemical fluid-based systems for improved climate control, heating, cooling, dehumidification, and drying in greenhouse farming. It includes consortium overview, technology concept, pilot demonstrations, case studies, life cycle and techno-economic analyses, and policy recommendations.
